parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human presenter in a natural environment with consistent lighting and fluid, natural movements. There are no AI artifacts like distorted fingers or uncanny facial expressions, and the phone screen shots are standard live-action recordings of a device.

characters.appearance: Young adult, medium build, fair complexion. Brown hair styled in a messy half-bun. She wears round glasses with thin frames and large, ornate gold earrings.
characters.wardrobe: A colorful horizontally striped collared shirt featuring red, white, blue, green, and brown stripes.

characters.appearance: Adult, medium build, fair complexion. Short brown hair and light facial stubble.
characters.wardrobe: A red and blue plaid button-down shirt.

scenes.setting: A bedroom or personal room with white walls, a plant vine, photos pinned to the wall, and an open wardrobe in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman stands in the center of the frame, facing the camera directly. She is positioned in a casually decorated room with white walls. A trailing plant vine and some photos are visible on the wall behind her. An open wardrobe can be seen in the background to the right. She uses expressive hand gestures as she speaks, pointing to herself, holding up fingers, and clasping her hands. The lighting is natural and even, highlighting her face and the colorful stripes of her shirt. Her demeanor is friendly and engaging.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a single continuous shot of the presenter talking directly to the camera in a casual indoor setting. Large, colorful, dynamic text overlays appear in the lower center of the screen. These text graphics change rapidly to match her speech word-for-word. The text uses a bold font with a black outline and bright fill colors like pink, blue, and yellow. The overall composition keeps the presenter centered while the text anchors the bottom third of the frame.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Hello and welcome back to my slow English podcast.
Character A says: Today I want to talk about some ways that I improved my English pronunciation.
Character A says: When I was a little girl learning a second language, I hated not being understood by others.
Character A says: So I would try every day to get feedback for my pronunciation from my teachers.
Character A says: There is an incredible app that I found that listens to your pronunciation and corrects you in real time.
scenes.on_screen_text:
HELLO
AND WELCOME BACK
TO MY SLOW
ENGLISH PODCAST.
TODAY I WANT TO
TALK ABOUT
SOME WAYS THAT I
IMPROVED
MY ENGLISH
PRONUNCIATION.
WHEN I WAS A LITTLE
GIRL LEARNING
A SECOND LANGUAGE,
I HATED NOT BEING
UNDERSTOOD
BY OTHERS.
SO I WOULD TRY
EVERY
DAY TO GET
FEEDBACK FOR MY
PRONUNCIATION
FROM MY TEACHERS.
THERE IS AN INCREDIBLE APP
THAT I FOUND
THAT LISTENS
TO YOUR PRONUNCIATION
AND CORRECTS YOU
IN REAL TIME.

scenes.setting: Close-up on hands holding a smartphone over a dark wooden table, with a small potted plant slightly out of focus in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A pair of hands holds a smartphone in a vertical orientation. The phone is positioned over a dark wooden surface. A small green plant is visible in the blurred background. The hands interact with the phone screen, tapping a button on the display. The lighting is soft and focused primarily on the device and the hands holding it. The background remains out of focus to keep attention on the phone.

scenes.visual_description: The shot focuses entirely on a smartphone being held and operated by a user's hands. The screen displays a pronunciation app interface with various buttons and text. Dynamic text overlays appear over the video footage, matching the voiceover. These overlays use the same bold, colorful style as the previous scene. The text is positioned in the lower half of the frame, partially obscuring the hands and the table.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: The app is called BoldVoice.
Character A says: For example, salmon.
Character A says: Salmon.
Character A says: The app shows me that the L is pronounced like M.
scenes.on_screen_text:
THE APP IS CALLED
BOLDVOICE.
FOR EXAMPLE, SALMON
SALMON.
THE APP SHOWS ME
THAT THE L IS
PRONOUNCED LIKE
M.

scenes.setting: A bedroom or personal room with white walls, a plant vine, photos pinned to the wall, and an open wardrobe in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: The young woman is back on screen in the same room setting. She continues to speak directly to the camera. She uses both hands to emphasize her points, pointing towards the viewer and gesturing openly. The framing remains a medium close-up, capturing her from the chest up. The lighting and background details, including the plant vine and wardrobe, remain consistent with her previous appearance. Her expression is bright and communicative.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter is shown in a medium close-up, talking to the camera in her room. Dynamic, colorful text overlays continue to appear in the lower half of the screen. The text is synchronized with her speech, popping up word by word or phrase by phrase. The bright colors of the text contrast with her striped shirt and the white walls. The composition remains focused on her face and upper body.

scenes.setting: Close-up on hands holding a smartphone over a dark wooden table, with a small potted plant slightly out of focus in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Hands hold a smartphone vertically over a dark wooden table. On the phone screen, a video of a man in a plaid shirt is playing. The hands hold the phone steady without interacting with the screen. The background features a blurred dark surface and a hint of a green plant. The lighting highlights the hands and the phone, while the surrounding environment is kept dark and out of focus.

scenes.visual_description: The camera focuses on a smartphone held in someone's hands over a table. The phone screen displays a video lesson featuring a male coach. Text overlays appear on top of the video footage, continuing the captioning style. The bold, colorful text is centered in the lower portion of the screen. The overlays provide a visual representation of the spoken audio while the phone screen shows the app's content.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Hollywood accent coaches to help with any words you struggle saying.
scenes.on_screen_text:

COACHES TO HELP
WITH ANY WORDS YOU
STRUGGLE SAYING.

scenes.setting: A bedroom or personal room with white walls, a plant vine, photos pinned to the wall, and an open wardrobe in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: The young woman is framed in a medium close-up in her room. She speaks enthusiastically to the camera. At one point, she holds up seven fingers to emphasize a number. She then brings her hands together in a gentle clasp. She maintains direct eye contact with the lens. Her expression remains bright and encouraging throughout the shot. The background elements like the photos and wardrobe are still visible behind her.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter delivers the final message directly to the camera in her room. The dynamic text overlays continue to flash on the screen. They highlight key phrases of her call to action in bright colors. The text is positioned centrally in the lower third of the frame. The video ends with her smiling at the camera as the final words appear on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: You should try the seven day free trial to start getting feedback on your English pronunciation.
scenes.on_screen_text:
